src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/clien.general_idea: Changed the base API endpoint from query.cgi to entry.cgi to align with DSM API standards.
Replaced individual @RequestParam annotations with a single @SpringQueryMap object to handle request parameters.

src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/model.general_idea: Changes the type of isLicenseEnough from boolean to int to match the API response format.
src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/model.human_impl: Changed private boolean isLicenseEnough to int isLicenseEnough;
